stemHtml: Which of the following options states the correct frequency band, propagation path and frequency range for an NDB?

options.a: UHF only, space waves, 329.15 MHz to 335 MHz
options.b: MF only, surface waves, 300 KHz to 1750 KHz.
options.c: VHF only, ground waves, 108 MHz to 117.975 MHz.
options.d: LF and MF, surface waves, 190 KHz to 1750 KHz.
